overall.description: Cinematic game engine footage of a Gothic great hall resembling the Harry Potter universe, with students in robes dining at long tables. The scene features dramatic natural lighting through tall stained glass windows, floating candles, and ornate stone architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: Gothic great hall with dining tables and floating candles

agents.ego_description: standing still observing the dining hall and students eating at the long tables

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes eating and conversing at the table
student reaching across the table for food items

entered.detail: tall Gothic arched window with colorful panes casting light patterns on the floor
hundreds of lit candles suspended in mid-air providing warm illumination
lengthy wooden tables set with plates, food, and dining utensils
ornate stone pillars supporting the high vaulted ceiling
high arched stone ceiling with intricate Gothic ribbing

segments.scene_description: The camera holds a steady view of a magnificent Gothic great hall filled with students dining at long wooden tables. Warm sunlight streams through the tall stained glass window on the left, mixing with the glow of floating candles overhead. Students in dark robes sit eating and conversing, while the camera slowly pans to take in the grand stone architecture and high vaulted ceiling.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a sweeping gaze across a magnificent Gothic great hall, transitioning from a focused view of dining students to a grand appreciation of the surrounding architecture. It begins with a steady view of students in dark robes conversing at long wooden tables, where warm sunlight streams through tall stained glass windows. As the camera begins to move, the golden light blends with the soft glow of floating candles drifting overhead. The scene then expands through a slow pan, shifting focus from the intimate activity at the tables toward the immense scale of the ornate stone walls and the high vaulted ceiling.
